weeks.label: Week 3
weeks.topic: Choose a plant and describe what it would need to survive.

weeks.label: Week 4
weeks.topic: Bring in a photograph or drawing of your family’s or a friend’s pet. Discuss how you would care for it.

weeks.label: Week 5
weeks.topic: Think about the pet you chose last week for news. If you had to create a shelter for it, what would the shelter need to have and why?

weeks.label: Week 6
weeks.topic: Choose an Australian native animal and explain its habitat and diet. Extension: discuss any adaptations the animal needs to survive in the current environment.

weeks.label: Week 7
weeks.topic: Pretend you are packing a suitcase to go on a holiday. Share with the class the items you would take (discuss needs and wants).

weeks.label: Week 8
weeks.topic: If you could create the best garden or zoo, what would be in it and how would you take care of the garden or zoo?

weeks.label: Week 9
weeks.topic: Research three interesting facts about a chosen living thing and share your findings.

weeks.label: Week 10
weeks.topic: Discuss three facts that you have learnt about butterflies this term. (e.g. the life cycle)
